category_sources: Official GitHub README describes previewing ReStructuredText documents while editing.
source_facts.description says restview is a viewer for ReStructuredText documents rendered on the fly.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses restview.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes installation, synopsis, options, and usage examples.
source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is mgedmin/restview and its README describes the same ReStructuredText viewer.
PyPI/project metadata and distro upstream metadata identify https://github.com/mgedmin/restview as the source repository.
tags_sources: Official README documents command-line usage via restview.
source_facts.description and official README identify ReStructuredText rendering and previewing.
